name: arenula-mcp
description: MCP server suite for the s&box game engine — editor control, API reference, and documentation

scripts.build: npm run build --prefix api && npm run build --prefix docs
scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix api && npm install --prefix docs
scripts.setup: npm run install-all && npm run build

author: Nyx000
license: SEE LICENSE IN api/LICENSE, docs/LICENSE, editor/LICENSE
